_title: AOC President's Room Ceiling S-216 — Conservation/Stabilization of Plaster & Decorative Paint — in-scope services CAUTION key (gradeable schema)
_suiteRole: IN-SCOPE services CAUTION anchor, re-expressed in the JudgmentKey (namedGates) schema so scoreJudgment can grade it. CONTENT-IDENTICAL to v2 (verdict/eligible/caution/decoy unchanged) — SHAPE only. Supersedes v2, which carried the same content in the un-gradeable card-68 caution_reasons schema (card-71 finding). Refills the CAUTION verdict pole #5 vacated when it reclassified to oos_detection.
_acquisitionPart_basis: source-grounded (NOT assumed): FAR Part 15 Contracting by Negotiation — 52.215-x clauses present (×24) + 'negotiated' procurement language (×12). Not a commercial-item/Part-12 buy.

expectedVerdict.reason: Unrestricted professional-services (NAICS 541990) conservation procurement with no disqualifying bar under null bidderProfile. Caution is driven by demanding specialized-conservator qualification gates (verify-status, not structural). NOT INELIGIBLE: the acquisition does not establish a set-aside, so eligibility is an open field. No prevailing-wage standard applies (Davis-Bacon AND SCA both explicitly excluded) — a wage-determination flag must NOT be raised.

namedGates.sourceCite: Senior Conservators shall have a minimum of twenty (20) years of successful [experience]; Conservators shall have a minimum Ten (10) years; Fine Art Painting Conservator/Project Director; Architectural Conservator (AC) shall review reference documents

_decoy_basis: Source: 'Davis Bacon Act IS NOT applicable as this requirement is being classified [as services]' + 'The McNamara-O'Hara Service Contract Act (SCA) IS NOT applicable to this procurement.' NO prevailing-wage standard applies — raising any wage-determination flag is a false positive (must-not-raise decoy, like #5's funds-not-available).
_provenance_note: NAICS 541990 (All Other Professional, Scientific & Technical Services) + 52.219-14/50% limitation-on-subcontracting OMITTED (does not bind on this unrestricted, no-set-aside buy; not in source) — recorded as provenance only, NOT a gate or decoy.

supersedes.reason: same CONTENT, wrong SCHEMA — v2 used the card-68 caution_reasons shape, which scoreJudgment cannot grade (card-71 finding); re-expressed in the JudgmentKey/namedGates schema. v2 retired byte-identical.

adjudication.rulingRef: Brain cards 66/68 (in-scope CAUTION) · 67 (caution-basis source correction) · 73 (re-shape to gradeable JudgmentKey schema)
